text:
Paladin's Necklace (, Seikishi no Kubikazari) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

| colspan="3" align="center" |This card can be won in the monthly Tug of War game held in the city of Antokiba.
|
|}

Summary

This card allows the caster to bring forth a Paladin's Necklace. When wearing this necklace, it protects the user from spells cast upon them. It also has the ability to undo curses placed on other cards, thus reverting the cards to their original form.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.084 :: 
これを身につけたプレイヤーは呪いをはね返すことができる上、触れたカードの呪いも解くことができる。
|-
![Eng]
|No.084 :: Paladin's Necklace 
The player wearing this necklace will repel curses cast on them. It will also undo curses on cards upon touching them.
|}

Trivia

This is one of the winning 3 cards Gon chose to take out the game.
